set.body: Internal (private[gale]) dense spectral kernels that everything else builds on: symmetric tridiagonalization (Householder) + implicit-shift tridiagonal QL/QR eigensolver, and Hessenberg reduction + Francis double-shift QR for the real nonsymmetric case. These serve small dense problems directly and solve the projected problems inside Lanczos/Arnoldi partial methods. Golub & Van Loan conventions; no public API surface.
